title: Sorting groups alphabetically - is this feature available yet?
excerpt: Sorting groups alphabetically - is this feature available yet? Seems like something that you should be able to do but I am unable to find how to not sort these manually.

posts.author: heathercliff (heather)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorting groups alphabetically - is this feature available yet? Seems like something that you should be able to do but I am unable to find how to not sort these manually.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @heathercliff,

I am afraid this feature isn’t supported in the platform as of yet. We recognize that this is a highly requested feature, so will be sure to follow up with our product team about this. Once I hear back, I can happily respond here.

Thanks for your patience!

posts.author: SWise (Sherry)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a very helpful feature! We have a lot of folders and it’s a pain to constantly make adjustments when we add new ones.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I completely understand! We’ve heard back from our product team, and in full transparency, this particular feature isn’t currently on our immediate roadmap, however as mentioned, the team is certainly aware of this request, and hope to investigate a potential roll-out early to mid next year - thanks for your understanding in advance

posts.author: cgmonday (Chris G)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca! Checking in to see if there is any update on this potential feature. Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chris!

I am afraid I don’t have any new updates at this stage. I will continue to update this thread when new information is shared with us

posts.author: KJones (Kelly Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Alphabetical orgination of groups by automation should be a basic feature, and it would help many users.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Kelly - alphabetical sorting of groups is something our team hopes to tackle next year. In regard to your reference to automations, are you interested in alphabetical sorting automatically when an item is created in that group?

posts.author: User129438 (John S)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 vote on this, I like that groups can be manually arranged, but on boards with like 30 groups and you want them alphabetically sorted, it should be 1 button click away. Super basic

posts.author: GillesEXO (Gilles BAULARD)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is simply incredible that such a smple feature isn’t implemented…

The more I discover Monday the more I regret , the limitations in calculations, the sortation limitations etc… I start to regret putting so much effort in a tool like Monday…

I will check export and see if I can find something that actually “Works”

posts.author: poovannan (Poovannan Dhakshinamoorthy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, Ability to Sort Groups (not referring to sorting items within a group) is a basic, yet much needed feature for our teams. How can we help to prioritize this feature?

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
if you still need to sort groups Alphabetically, you can have a try to Groups manager app
https://monday.com/marketplace/10000359

It allows to reorder groups, sort, bulk delete or archive groups.

I hope it will helps you all.

Vincent

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
We just dropped an update of Groups Manager that will give you the info about empty groups (groups without any item) and bulk actions to archive/delete these.

image630×712 40.2 KB

Give it a try here : https://monday.com/marketplace/10000359

posts.author: PayWay369 (paytonwest@hotmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: did this ever get implemented? some of our boards have hundreds of groups and we have to scroll all the way to the bottom just to see the most recent group as our groups are titled by dates. this is an XS enhancement. please show a dev and they will explain how simple it is to implement this

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: I have voted for this featue request Need feature to allow me to sort groups in a board

posts.author: PayWay369 (paytonwest@hotmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here… the deeper you get, the more 3rd parties start increasing and the more roadblocks you encounter.

posts.author: Rellis (Rick Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml: 2 years ago they said they would implement it within the following year… 2024. It’s now the end of 2025 and still nothing. I’ve run into this sort of issue before where needs are met by adding apps from marketplace, of course it’s at a higher cost. Groups manager provides a need that should be a basic function of the product.
